canonical_answer: Two individuals wearing white tank tops and white pants are seated and playing percussion instruments with their hands. The person in the foreground has long dark dreadlocks and plays smaller drums with metallic rims. Behind them, another person plays a set of two yellow conga drums featuring a triangular logo. In the background, people wearing white clothing walk barefoot across a paved surface with grass growing between the tiles.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A musician with long dark dreadlocks sits in the foreground playing drums with light-colored heads and wooden shells. Behind them, a second musician plays stacked yellow conga drums with black hardware and a visible logo. Both performers wear white sleeveless tops and white pants while seated on a tiled floor. A wooden pillar with vertical slats stands near the musicians. Barefoot individuals walk on the paved ground outside.

question: Describe the sequence of musical performance and background movement observed in the clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a person with dreadlocks plays smaller drums while another plays yellow congas behind them; at 6s, both musicians continue seated percussion on paved ground with grass gaps; at 14s, a third person walks away in the background while the middle musician claps hands; at 18s, the barefoot person walks across the paved surface as drumming continues.

question: Describe the visual details of the performers' attire and instruments throughout the video.
